page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.c2 server family. It is configured with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. The instance is provisioned with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It runs on the KVM hypervisor, ensuring virtualization-level isolation.

This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Additionally, there are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with the default configuration.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.c2.xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated physical cores ensure consistent compute performance without resource contention from hyperthreading. This makes the instance suitable for application servers, medium-sized databases, containerized microservices, and build systems where predictable CPU execution is required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs with a single thread per core, ensuring predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage for data persistence. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile, the ecs.c2.xlarge is suited for workloads such as application hosting, containerized microservices, build environments, and medium-sized database deployments that require consistent processing power and stable memory access.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 16 dedicated physical cores, 16 vCPUs, and 64.0 GB of RAM on the KVM hypervisor, with no local storage or bundled GPUs.

tagline: A dedicated 16-core x86_64 virtual server with 64 GB of memory, designed for balanced and predictable general-purpose compute workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
